calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-11-2006 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-30-2006 Continued To Jul-21-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jun-06-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Denise Carpenter.
Joseph Creitz, Esq. for Plaintiff: Kevin Webb, present with Witness: Annette Bone, Mark Jennings and Steven Grealish.
Plaintiff and Witnesses were sworn and examined.
Exhibit 1---Copy of Ltr. dtd 8-25-99-------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---Copy of Ltr. dtd 5-01-99-------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 3---Sealed Deposition of Scott Rugg dtd 5-11-05------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 4---Scott Rugg's response to Plaintiff's Special Interrogatories-----ID/EVID.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Scott Rugg dba Scott Rugg Electric, dbd Scott Rugg Architectural Lighting as follows:
Damages $30,000.00
Prejudgment Interest $21,000.00
Costs $1,657.05, for a total of $52,657.05
Judgment and Order signed in open court, see scanned doc. for details of the Order.

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-18-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Order to Show Cause to Scott Rugg for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is heard this day. Court ordered OSC off calendar/good cause. Proceedings reported by: Peppina Thompson, CSR#7433 (212)

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel The Deposition Of Scott Rugg And To Produce Documents
Off Calendar Dec-07-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's Motion To Compel The Deposition of Scott Rugg and To Produce Documents is Granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to appear for further deposition and to produce documents is a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to appear for further deposition on a date to be agreed upon by counsel, but no later than within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $606.30, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

MEDIATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-12-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearance for Plaintiff. Defendant's counsel is sanctioned $250.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is ordered off calendar/Court will order case to the San Francisco Bar Early Settlement Program. Proceedings reported by: Anthony Vaughn (212)
